title: artifact-verification
description: Machine-written proof that the verification step ran for a stage. Presence gate input: proves the step ran, not who ran it — actor is attribution, never authorization. Written to plans/<active-plan>/artifacts/verification.json.

stage.description: Stage this verification covers (push|pr|merge|ship|deploy); descriptive only, not enum-validated

plan.description: Plan dir name this verification belongs to

checks.description: Named checks; any FAIL blocks hard stages

verdict.description: Overall verdict of the verification run

ticket_id.description: Seam for the task-store issue/MR link; optional
